title: QueryTasksInput
description: JSON Schema for the query_tasks() input parameters: filters, sort, limit, offset.

filters.description: Filter object. All fields are optional. Multiple filter keys are combined with AND; values that are arrays imply OR semantics within that key.

projects.description: Multiple project names; matches any listed project (OR).

priority.description: Priority code: H, M, L or empty string for none.

status.description: Task status or list of statuses (e.g. 'pending', 'completed').

tags_any.description: Task has ANY of these tags (OR).

tags_all.description: Task has ALL of these tags (AND).

due_before.description: Due date upper bound. ISO date/time or TaskWarrior expression (e.g., "today", "eow").

due_after.description: Due date lower bound. ISO date/time or TaskWarrior expression.

text.description: Full-text query applied to description and tags.

sort.description: Sort fields in precedence order. Prefix a field with '-' for descending order (e.g., '-due'). Supported fields include: due, priority, urgency, start, end, project.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Null or omitted means server default/no limit.

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.
